hero.description: Custom website design and development services for Calicut businesses that want to attract customers, generate qualified leads, and grow online.

challenges.title: Your Website Should Do More Than
challenges.description: Many businesses in Calicut rely on websites that look modern but struggle to generate inquiries, communicate value, or perform well in search.
challenges.secondaryDescription: At Fillip Technologies, we build fast, discoverable, scalable websites designed around measurable business outcomes.
challenges.cta: See How We Solve These Challenges

items.title: Slow Performance
items.description: Slow pages create poor first impressions and cause potential customers to leave before they explore your services. Calicut's growing digital audience demands fast-loading websites.

items.title: Poor User Experience
items.description: Unclear navigation and confusing layouts make it harder for visitors to understand your business and take action. User-centric design is crucial for Calicut's diverse customer base.

items.title: Low Conversion Rates
items.description: Traffic has limited value when pages do not guide visitors toward calls, inquiries, bookings, or purchases. Every website should be optimized for conversions.

items.title: Limited Scalability
items.description: Outdated platforms become difficult to manage as your content, services, integrations, and customer base grow. Future-proof your business with scalable solutions.

items.title: Weak Digital Presence
items.description: With Kerala's rapidly digitizing economy, Calicut businesses need websites that stand out and rank well locally to compete effectively.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about website design and development services for businesses in Calicut.

items.question: How much does website design cost in Calicut?
items.answer: The cost depends on the number of pages, required features, integrations, content needs, and overall project complexity. We provide a tailored estimate after understanding your requirements. Prices typically range from ₹20,000 to ₹3,50,000+ depending on project scope.

items.question: How long does it take to build a business website?
items.answer: A typical business website can take 4-8 weeks from discovery to launch. Larger ecommerce or custom application projects may require 10-12 weeks or more. We provide realistic timelines during the consultation phase.

items.question: Will my website be mobile-friendly and SEO-ready?
items.answer: Yes. We build responsive websites with performance, accessibility, technical SEO foundations, and clear content structure considered throughout development. All websites are mobile-first by design.

items.question: Can you redesign an existing website?
items.answer: Yes. We can review your current website, retain what is working, and improve its design, structure, performance, usability, and conversion paths. We work with you to modernize your online presence without losing existing brand equity.

items.question: Do you offer website maintenance services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive website maintenance packages including security updates, backups, content updates, performance optimization, and technical support.

items.question: What industries do you serve in Calicut?
items.answer: We serve businesses across all industries in Calicut including IT, healthcare, education, tourism, retail, manufacturing, real estate, and professional services. Our experience spans diverse sectors.
